title: limonium merxmuelleri subsp. oristanum
intro: Limonium merxmuelleri subsp. oristanum, also known as Oristano sea lavender, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oristano sea lavender include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, salves, and ointments, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
